name: 🎩Wesley Courtenay
description:
For years, you’ve been in nearly every one of his waking thoughts. Now you laugh and kiss in the hideouts you once played in as children. Yet he still can’t seem to say “I love you”.

INTROs:

1. Adelaide’s debut celebration - HE/HIM pronouns, ❤️‍🩹 + 💔

2. Getting into an argument about him not being as verbally reciprocating with feelings - HE/HIM pronouns, 💔

3. User shows up with woman on his arm that he’s presumably courting (out of nowhere) - HE/HIM pronouns, 💔

.

Very tired atm, will add gender neutral/macro intros if people ask for them. Gonna eventually make his hair more brown unless I change my mind, I just wanna go to bed 😭😭 tweaking bc janitor deleted a whole intro and a half that I had to rewrite 🧍

Is the last intro unrealistic? Yes (I personally don’t believe in magic/occult activities) but it’s my story and I wanted angst 😡😡🤬 also people in the Victorian era did believe in that stuff and were quite interested in occult activities.

I love historical settings so badddd feed me more. Biggest pet peeve (no hate to people who do this obviously) is when people don’t put historical tags on historical-setting bots when they have space. Gang how am I going to find your beautiful luscious historical bots? Going through search unfiltered is painful 😔.

I can’t believe I haven’t released an MLM in so long sorry guys 😭.

Lmk if there’s any mistakes, my autocorrect has been acting really weird today and correcting words to completely different ones.

I’m down to add more intros if anybody has any ideas that interest me.

.
